task objective: Implement the in-plugin updater feature for SDH-Ludusavi including GitHub Release discovery, SemVer version comparisons, checksum/manifest validation, and isolated Decky Loader installation hand-off.
tests added: tests/test_updater.py (covers version parser, SemVer comparisons, local build stable-equivalence, candidate selection, release manifest validation, rate limiting interpreted resets, candidate revalidation)
tests/test_updater_service.py (covers service settings defaults, channel coercion, automatic update throttling, startup pending install reconciliation)
design decisions: 1. Extracted all updater logic to py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/updater.py to keep SDHLudusaviService facade clean and under the 400-line architecture limit. 2. Created an isolated src/utils/deckyInstaller.ts adapter to guard window.DeckyBackend access and support call/callable fallbacks. 3. Enforced strict SemVer version comparisons treating local builds (X.Y.Z+...) as stable-equivalent to prevent same-base downgrades. 4. Implemented 24-hour rate limit caches for update checks, bypassing on manual check but preserving session-level GitHub cooldown blocks. 5. Wrapped warning icon styles inside custom span wrappers to avoid React-Icons TS styling type errors.
results: All python pytest test cases (418 passed), typescript compilation check, and Rollup builds pass validation successfully. Verified the implementation against the strict TDD criteria, verified that the clean-context review gates pass, and updated developer and user-facing documentations.
